notes: L8 activity 45 'GCP Through an AWS Lens', 7 cues. Uses cloud.py (service_box, map_pair GCP≈AWS, column, hierarchy, iam_binding). No formulas (identity/boundary model). READ start/mid/end each cue; accumulate-then-hold so mid==end (no transient collisions). Layout defects fixed at smoke stage (safe-area). Last-cue end frame re-extracted within muxed duration. All cues pass at -ql.
